architecture_notes.sfx: SFXManager.ts exports initSFXManager(). AudioContext created lazily. Uses CustomEvent 'merlin_sfx'. Add startAmbient(type)/stopAmbient() as module-level exports.
architecture_notes.card_rendering: CardOverlay.ts showCard() creates .card-option divs. CSS in index.html. Card HTML structure: #card-overlay > .card-container > .card-narrative + .card-options > .card-option(.verb+.desc)
architecture_notes.boot: runBootScreen() in main.ts waits 2.6s then fades boot-screen. Boot skip: listen for click/keydown during the wait and resolve early.
architecture_notes.card_types: Card has: narrative(string), options(array of {verb, text, effects[]}). Effects: {type:'ADD_REPUTATION'|'HEAL_LIFE'|'DAMAGE_LIFE'|'PROMISE', faction?:string, amount:number}
